title: Barbie DIY Fashion Designer Set – Make Your Own Casual Look | Includes T-Shirt, Leggings, Stickers, Ribbons & Stamp | Creative Fashion Toy Kit for Kids Ages 5+
features: 💖 Create Your Own Barbie Fashion – Design stylish outfits using real Barbie accessories: stamp, stickers, ribbons, and fabric clothing. Mix and match your own casual look!
👗 Includes 20 DIY Accessories – Complete set with T-shirt, leggings, 15+ stickers, 2 ribbons, and an exclusive Barbie silhouette stamp for endless customization fun.
🎨 Encourages Creativity & Self-Expression – Kids can explore fashion design by stamping patterns, sticking on accessories, and using their imagination to style Barbie.
📦 Ready-to-Use Craft Kit – All ribbons include double-sided tape for easy application. No glue needed! Just peel, stick, and style.
🎁 Perfect Gift for Barbie Fans – Ideal Barbie gift for girls ages 5 and up who love crafting, customizing, and playing with Barbie fashion.
✅ Compatible With Barbie Dolls – The clothes fit standard Barbie dolls (not included), letting kids personalize their doll’s wardrobe with every new creation.
description: Product Description Barbie – Inspiring Creativity & Fashion Play Barbie DIY Fashion Design Set – Create Your Own Casual Look! Unleash your child’s creativity with the Barbie DIY Fashion Design Set , the perfect toy for young fashion lovers and aspiring designers. This fun and engaging craft kit for kids includes real Barbie clothing pieces: a T-shirt and leggings ready for your little one to customise using the included stickers , ribbons , and Barbie stamp . With over 20 pieces in the set, children can easily stamp, stick, and create unique designs, giving Barbie a personalised wardrobe full of custom outfits. The ribbons come with double-sided tape , making decorating quick and mess-free — perfect for young hands. Whether creating stylish everyday looks or bold fashion statements, kids can design their own patterns using the iconic Barbie-themed stamp and over 15 stickers. The ready-to-use DIY fashion set encourages self-expression, storytelling, and hands-on creativity, making it a perfect addition to any Barbie fan’s collection. This Barbie fashion accessories kit is ideal for kids aged 5 and up and makes a fantastic gift for birthdays, holidays, or just because! Perfect for girls who love Barbie dolls , fashion play , and creative craft toys . Everything You Need to Create Your Own Barbie Look All the neccesary accesories included Real Barbie T-Shirt and Leggings to customize 15+ Barbie-themed stickers 2 colourful ribbons with double-sided tape Custom Barbie stamp to create your own patterns Stamp, Stick & Create Add unique patterns with the Barbie stamp and stickers See the Transformation – Before & After! From blank basics to custom fashion pieces, watch your child’s creativity come to life. Everything You Need to Create Your Own Barbie Look Real Barbie T-Shirt and Leggings to customize 15+ Barbie-themed stickers 2 colourful ribbons with double-sided tape Custom Barbie stamp to create your own patterns
